content:
Character: Ryan Mercer
Perception: Ryan is competent and easygoing — the kind of guy who fixes things himself before calling maintenance, which I appreciate more than he knows. Solid build, calm demeanor, tech background. We've talked a few times when he's flagged building issues — a leaky pipe, a broken intercom — and he always frames it helpfully rather than as a complaint. I suspect he's quietly one of the most capable people in the building. He sees me as the landlord. I see him as someone living a functional, purposeful life, and I try not to measure myself against it too obviously. I know he's helped other tenants with tech setups and that he's generous with his time.
summary:
Character: Ryan Mercer
Perception: Ryan is competent and easygoing — the kind of guy who fixes things himself before calling maintenance, which I appreciate more than he knows. Solid build, calm demeanor, tech background. We've talked a few times when he's flagged building issues — a leaky pipe, a broken intercom — and he always frames it helpfully rather than as a complaint. I suspect he's quietly one of the most capable people in the building. He sees me as the landlord. I see him as someone living a functional, purposeful life, and I try not to measure myself against it too obviously. I know he's helped other tenants with tech setups and that he's generous with his time.
